# UC-13.1.54 · Prometheus Rule Evaluation Missed or Skipped Evaluations

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Operations, Fault &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch when scheduled work is skipped or delayed so we are not blind to what alerts and reports were supposed to do.*

---

## Description

Missed evaluations delay alerting on critical SLO and security rules.

## Value

Surfaces overloaded Prometheus or slow queries blocking rule groups.

## Implementation

Join with `prometheus_rule_group_duration_seconds` if ingested.

## SPL

```spl
| mstats sum(_value) AS misses WHERE index=prometheus metric_name="prometheus_rule_evaluation_misses_total" span=1h BY rule_group, job
| where misses > 0
| sort - misses
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (misses by group), Single value (total misses).

## Known False Positives

Skips during scheduler load spikes, after restart catch-up, or during upgrade windows. We check activity and change windows before we call it a fault.

## References

- [Prometheus documentation — monitoring Prometheus](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/troubleshooting/)
- [Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/observability/en/gdi/opentelemetry/opentelemetry.html)
